stories.title: Giants 20 Scoreless Innings — Matching a 117-Year-Old Franchise Record

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
Giants: 20 straight innings without scoring to open 2026.

That matches a franchise record from 1909.

Swept by the Yankees 13-1. Finally scored in Game 3 — and still lost.

Historically rough start for Tony Vitello's first series.

#SFGiants #MLB #BaseballTwitter

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
Giants scored their first run in 20 innings.

Jung Hoo Lee doubled. Matt Chapman singled. Crowd went wild.

For a run that still meant a loss.

That's where San Francisco is right now. 😬

#SFGiants #MLB

article.headline: Giants Go 20 Straight Innings Without Scoring to Open 2026 — Matching a 117-Year-Old Franchise Record

image_concepts.raw:
Giants 20 Scoreless Innings

**Image Concept:** Giants dugout / bench shot showing frustration or quiet contemplation after a shutout loss. Could also use Matt Chapman at the plate — the first Giants batter to drive in a run.

- `San Francisco Giants Yankees`

stories.title: Munetaka Murakami — HR in First 3 MLB Games (Only 4th Player Ever)

x_posts.label: Post 2-1
x_posts.text:
Munetaka Murakami homered in his first 3 MLB games.

Only the 4th player in baseball history to do it.

Others: DeLauter (this week), Trevor Story (2016), Kyle Lewis (2019).

Story holds the record at 4. Murakami needs one more.

#WhiteSox #MLB #BaseballTwitter

x_posts.label: Post 2-2
x_posts.text:
Murakami came from Japan with 246 career home runs and broke Sadaharu Oh's single-season NPB record in 2022.

White Sox fans: you have your slugger.

3 HR in 3 games. 4 walks. .538 OBP.

Pat Murphy (Brewers manager): "The park doesn't seem big enough to hold him."

#WhiteSox #MLB

article.headline: Munetaka Murakami Homers in His First Three MLB Games — Only the 4th Player in History

image_concepts.label: Image
image_concepts.raw:
Munetaka Murakami — 3 HRs in 3 Games

**Image Concept:** Murakami mid-swing or watching a home run leave the park. Power pose, bat flip moment preferred. The Brewers home run ball in right-center.

**Imagn Search Terms:**
- `Munetaka Murakami White Sox`
- `Murakami Chicago`

**Credit:** (USA TODAY Sports Images)

stories.title: Emerson Hancock — 6 No-Hit Innings, Mariners 8-0 Guardians

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text:
Emerson Hancock threw 6 no-hit innings Sunday.

9 strikeouts. Career high. Not one ball left the infield.

Pulled at 97 pitches. DeLauter singled off the reliever in the 7th.

Hancock joins Felix Hernandez in exclusive Mariners company.

#Mariners #MLB #BaseballTwitter

article.headline: Emerson Hancock Throws Six No-Hit Innings as Mariners Rout Guardians 8-0

image_concepts.raw:

**Imagn Search Terms:**

- `Emerson Hancock Seattle`

**Credit:** (USA TODAY Sports Images)

stories.title: Brewers Complete Season-Opening Sweep — Yelich Pinch-Hit HR

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
Christian Yelich hit the first pinch-hit HR of his career yesterday.

421 feet. 111.1 mph. 3-run shot. Brewers trailed 7-2 before the 8th.

First career PH homer for a guy who's been in the league since 2013.

Milwaukee is 3-0. Don't sleep on them.

#Brewers #MLB #BaseballTwitter

article.headline: Yelich's Pinch-Hit Blast Caps 6-Run Rally as Brewers Complete Season-Opening Sweep

image_concepts.label: Image
image_concepts.raw:
Brewers Sweep — Yelich Pinch-Hit HR

**Image Concept:** Yelich watching the ball leave the park (bat drop, watching flight), or rounding the bases after the pinch-hit shot. The crowd reaction moment at American Family Field.

**Imagn Search Terms:**
- `Christian Yelich Brewers`
- `Christian Yelich Milwaukee`

**Credit:** (USA TODAY Sports Images)

stories.title: Shohei Ohtani Pitching Debut — Tuesday, March 31 vs. Guardians

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
Shohei Ohtani makes his 2026 pitching debut TOMORROW.

vs. Cleveland at Dodger Stadium. March 31.

Final spring start: 4+ IP, 11 K, 86 pitches.

Roberts: "He's ready to go. The intensity was there."

Must-watch baseball. ⚾

#Dodgers #MLB #Ohtani

article.headline: Full Two-Way Mode: What to Expect from Ohtani's First Regular-Season Start of 2026

stories.title: MacKenzie Gore Debuts for Rangers — 5 Hitless Innings, 7 Ks

x_posts.label: Post 6
x_posts.text:
MacKenzie Gore made his Rangers debut Sunday.

5 hitless innings. 7 strikeouts. Struck out Bryce Harper with bases loaded.

Rangers got Nimmo and McCutchen HRs. Won 8-3. Took the series from the Phillies.

Gore's going to be really good in Texas.

#Rangers #MLB #BaseballTwitter

article.headline: MacKenzie Gore Nearly No-Hits the Phillies in His Rangers Debut — 5 Hitless Innings, 7 Ks

stories.title: Early Season Standings + Aaron Judge Approaching 400 HR

x_posts.label: Post 7
x_posts.text:
Three teams at 3-0 after opening weekend:

Dodgers. Yankees. Brewers.

None of them surprising. All of them look dangerous.

Aaron Judge needs 32 HR for 400 — fastest pace in MLB history.

Early days. ⚾

#MLB #BaseballTwitter #Yankees
